serviceDescription: AWS Elemental MediaConnect is a high-quality transport service for live video.

cards.title: Transport stream flows
cards.helpText: With AWS Elemental MediaConnect, you are charged based on two dimensions: active resources and data transfer. An active resource in MediaConnect is called a flow, defined as a single input connected to one or more outputs. You are billed at an hourly rate for each running flow, plus either a per-gigabyte charge for data transferred using the flow or, with reserved outbound bandwidth pricing, a per-hour charge based on bandwidth for video sent to the internet. A flow that is in standby mode is not an active resource, and does not incur active resource costs even if it has outputs or entitlements configured. No long-term commitments or upfront payments are required and you can increase or decrease usage at any time, except for reserved outbound bandwidth, which requires a 12-month commitment at a set bandwidth tier.

components.text: The total GB outbound (monthly) amount in the calculations section can be used to estimate data transfer costs in the section below for outbound data transfer to internet.

components.label: Outbound reserved bandwidth
components.description: Reserved outbound bandwidth is charged for every hour in the month, for each month of your commitment period.

components.label: metered unit name for outbound bandwidth

refers.variableLabel: metered unit name for outbound bandwidth

components.label: price per hour for active flow usage

components.outputUnitLabel: Data Transfer to internet GB (outbound monthly)

components.label: Total GB to be used in inbound and outbound data transfer to internet in data transfer section below
components.referLabel: Data Transfer to internet GB (outbound monthly)

operands.variableLabel: price per hour for active flow usage

cards.title: CDI and JPEG XS flows
cards.helpText: MediaConnect CDI and JPEG XS flows are billed at an hourly rate for each running flow, plus an hourly rate for each output. The rates are dependent on the flow's maximum video size, which you define at creation time. Reserved outbound bandwidth is not available with MediaConnect CDI and JPEG XS flows.

components.label: metered unit name for running flow

refers.variableLabel: metered unit name for running flow

components.label: metered unit name for running output

refers.variableLabel: metered unit name for running output

components.label: Elemental MediaConnect CDI and JPEG XS flow cost

cards.title: NDI flows
cards.helpText: NDI flows are billed at a flat hourly rate per running flow. NDI outputs are included at no additional data transfer cost within VPC. If transport stream outputs are added to NDI flows, standard MediaConnect data transfer charges apply through the data transfer card below.

components.label: price per hour for NDI flow usage

operands.variableLabel: price per hour for NDI flow usage

cards.title: Data transfer
cards.helpText: Data transfer charges are incurred when MediaConnect transfers data to or from MediaConnect resources, AWS Elemental MediaLive, or other AWS services. You also incur additional charges when you serve content outside of AWS. If the live video output is delivered to a destination outside of AWS, then internet data transfer charges apply after the first 100 GB per month. The pricing below is based on data transferred using MediaConnect.

components.text: The total GB outbound (monthly) amount in the calculations section of the Transport stream flows card can be used to estimate data transfer costs in the section below for outbound data transfer to internet.

components.label: info alert
components.content: The intra-region data transfer price is $0.01/GB total for MediaConnect, not in each direction as reflected in the below calculations. For example, an intra-region data transfer for 20 GB/month is $0.20 [currency], not $0.40 [currency].

components.label: Data Transfer
components.title: Enter the data you expect to transfer out of $[Region]

OUTBOUND.title: Outbound data transfer
OUTBOUND.description: Outbound data transfer to internet: If purchasing reserved outbound bandwidth, you are only charged for excess bitrate delivered above the bandwidth commitment.

notifications.content: If you included intra-region data transfer in your estimate, your actual estimate may be less than shown, as noted above.
